## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds, and I rebuilt `dist/` if runtime behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense.
- [ ] All query values go through bound parameters (no string concatenation).
